exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 60kg × 5-10 reps; regress slightly to MEV volume at RPE 7, rebuild momentum

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 50kg × 10 reps; hold conservative at RPE 7 for volume accumulation

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.suggestion_note: Week 1 rear delt volume = 3 sets here + 3 sets Cable Rear Delt Fly = 6 total ≥ front delt MEV 4. Shoulder-safe, high reps for scapular health and rotator cuff activation

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 5kg × 10 reps; progress to 6kg to maintain rear delt stimulus and balance anterior shoulder dominance

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 25kg × 8 reps; hold at 24kg for MEV accumulation (4 sets toward biceps MEV 8). Primary biceps stimulus

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 10kg × 9 reps; maintain at 10kg for volume accumulation. Completes biceps MEV at RPE 7

notes: PULL DAY WEEK 1 MEV. Warm-up: Band external rotations 2×15/arm + band pull-aparts 2×15 before working sets — rotator cuff rehab mandatory. Tempo 3-1-2 (eccentric-pause-concentric) throughout. Stop 3–4 reps from failure (RPE 7). Rear delt volume = 6 sets (Face Pull 3 + Rear Delt Fly 3) ≥ front delt 4 sets (indirect from bench only) ✓. Lats = 6 sets (Lat Pulldown 3 + Cable Row 3), upper_back = 6 sets (Cable Row 3 secondary + Face Pull 3 secondary), biceps = 8 sets (Barbell Curl 4 + Hammer Curl 4). All target muscles hit at MEV. No wide-grip or overhead pulling. Nutrition: 2800 kcal / 155g protein. Monitor shoulder — zero sharp pain >3/10.
